# MockupShot — Free Online Device Mockup Generator

| Tool | URL | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| Mockup Generator | https://mockupshot.online/ | Main tool - all frame types |
| Chrome Frame | https://mockupshot.online/chrome-browser-frame/ | Chrome browser frame |
| Safari Frame | https://mockupshot.online/safari-browser-frame/ | Safari browser frame |
| MacBook Frame | https://mockupshot.online/macbook-screenshot-frame/ | MacBook Pro 16" frame |
| iMac Frame | https://mockupshot.online/imac-screenshot-frame/ | iMac 24" frame |
| iPad Frame | https://mockupshot.online/ipad-screenshot-frame/ | iPad Pro frame |
